title: The Barbarian
description:
A foreigner washes up on the shore of a rural, seaside village... Found and taken care of by a long-grieving father, how will their unique relationship develop?
A Taiyô Matsumoto manga set in the Muromachi period, with aid and planning from French comic book artist Cyril Pedrosa.

Translation: kurkku
Lettering, other editing, script adaption: Jawsh
Occasional redraws: Waffleswall
author: Matsumoto Taiyô, Cyril Pedrosa
